title: Fruitful
description: Fruitful is a datapack that adds vanilla-friendly apple trees that spawn  occasionally in certain biomes. Apples on it can be picked up, With some rarely having golden apples.
body:
# What is this Data Pack?
Fruitful is a small datapack that Adds Vanilla-Friendly apple trees. That have actually pickable apples on them. And occasionally golden apples. There are different variations of them and more are to come. 
# Datapack Information
The apple trees consist of mainly four groups. Small, Medium,Large and grand apple trees. Each have breakable apples and sometimes golden apples as mentioned above. The apple trees will spawn at the following biomes: (Plains, Sunflower plains, Flowery forest and the meadows).
The trees aren't rare. But they're uncommon. The space between every apple tree on average is around 300-350 blocks. Or 15-18 chunks. Apple trees do not have a sapling and cannot reproduce apples on them. As it could be a little overpowered if that was the case. Additionally, Hoes Mine said apples faster in case you want to collect them in a bunch. And that's mostly it. Enjoy the datapack!
# Last notes
Everything said above is subject to change. If you got any suggestion, Question or a bug you might wanna report. Dm me directly through discord. (my tag is drpencil_). Or preferbly join my discord server!

**_And we've reached the end. Cheers!_**
